## Summary / 变更摘要

<!-- Explain the problem, intent, and resulting behavior. / 说明问题、意图和最终行为。 -->

## Scope / 影响范围

- [ ] Build or dependency management / 构建或依赖管理
- [ ] Foundation contracts / 基础契约
- [ ] Spring Boot integration / Spring Boot 接入
- [ ] Web or security feature / Web 或安全能力
- [ ] Persistence, tenant, or data permission / 持久化、租户或数据权限
- [ ] Audit or observability / 审计或可观测性
- [ ] Tooling, code generation, or test support / 工具、代码生成或测试支持
- [ ] Documentation or repository governance / 文档或仓库治理

## Compatibility / 兼容性

<!-- State API, Maven coordinate, configuration, runtime, and migration impact. / 说明 API、Maven 坐标、配置、运行时和迁移影响。 -->

## Verification / 验证

<!-- List exact commands and outcomes. / 列出实际执行的命令和结果。 -->

## Checklist / 检查项

- [ ] The change follows `AGENTS.md`, `CONTRIBUTING.md`, and module ownership boundaries.
- [ ] Public behavior and breaking changes are explicitly documented.
- [ ] Relevant tests were added or the missing-test reason is explained.
- [ ] No credentials, private keys, production data, or generated build output are included.
- [ ] CodeGraph was synchronized after source changes when `.codegraph/` exists.
- [ ] README fragments were updated and rendered when documentation changed.
- [ ] All linked Agent review Issues and review conversations are resolved before merge.
